items.title_en: Ford says Apple's software will be available in its new EVs, helping determine autonomous driving via Apple Maps, and they are working to improve self-driving (Jack Ewing/New York Times)
items.title_zh: 福特表示，苹果的软件将在其新款电动汽车中使用，帮助通过苹果地图确定自动驾驶，他们正在努力改进自动驾驶（Jack Ewing/纽约时报）
items.title_bilingual: 福特表示，苹果的软件将在其新款电动汽车中使用，帮助通过苹果地图确定自动驾驶，他们正在努力改进自动驾驶（Jack Ewing/纽约时报） / Ford says Apple's software will be available in its new EVs, helping determine autonomous driving via Apple Maps, and they are working to improve self-driving (Jack Ewing/New York Times)

items.title: Sources: Jeff Bezos pushed Prime Video head Mike Hopkins to highlight AI in an overhaul of the service, leading to an internal effort called Project Lighthouse (Reuters)
items.title_original: Sources: Jeff Bezos pushed Prime Video head Mike Hopkins to highlight AI in an overhaul of the service, leading to an internal effort called Project Lighthouse (Reuters)
items.title_en: Sources: Jeff Bezos pushed Prime Video head Mike Hopkins to highlight AI in an overhaul of the service, leading to an internal effort called Project Lighthouse (Reuters)
items.title_zh: 消息来源：杰夫·贝佐斯 (Jeff Bezos) 敦促 Prime Video 负责人迈克·霍普金斯 (Mike Hopkins) 在服务彻底改革中强调人工智能，从而引发了一项名为“灯塔计划”(Project Lighthouse) 的内部工作（路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 消息来源：杰夫·贝佐斯 (Jeff Bezos) 敦促 Prime Video 负责人迈克·霍普金斯 (Mike Hopkins) 在服务彻底改革中强调人工智能，从而引发了一项名为“灯塔计划”(Project Lighthouse) 的内部工作（路透社） / Sources: Jeff Bezos pushed Prime Video head Mike Hopkins to highlight AI in an overhaul of the service, leading to an internal effort called Project Lighthouse (Reuters)

items.title: A Google study using millions of de-identified AI interactions finds AI is helping workers, not replacing them, and much AI use is "shallow" for certain tasks (Justin Lahart/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: A Google study using millions of de-identified AI interactions finds AI is helping workers, not replacing them, and much AI use is "shallow" for certain tasks (Justin Lahart/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: A Google study using millions of de-identified AI interactions finds AI is helping workers, not replacing them, and much AI use is "shallow" for certain tasks (Justin Lahart/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 谷歌的一项研究使用了数百万去识别的人工智能交互，发现人工智能正在帮助工人，而不是取代他们，而且对于某些任务来说，许多人工智能的使用是“肤浅的”（贾斯汀·拉哈特/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 谷歌的一项研究使用了数百万去识别的人工智能交互，发现人工智能正在帮助工人，而不是取代他们，而且对于某些任务来说，许多人工智能的使用是“肤浅的”（贾斯汀·拉哈特/华尔街日报） / A Google study using millions of de-identified AI interactions finds AI is helping workers, not replacing them, and much AI use is "shallow" for certain tasks (Justin Lahart/Wall Street Journal)

items.title: In a leaked four-hour investor talk, DeepSeek's Liang Wenfeng says the main US-China gap is compute access, Nvidia's CUDA moat is disintegrating, and more (Fred Gao/Inside China)
items.title_original: In a leaked four-hour investor talk, DeepSeek's Liang Wenfeng says the main US-China gap is compute access, Nvidia's CUDA moat is disintegrating, and more (Fred Gao/Inside China)
items.title_en: In a leaked four-hour investor talk, DeepSeek's Liang Wenfeng says the main US-China gap is compute access, Nvidia's CUDA moat is disintegrating, and more (Fred Gao/Inside China)
items.title_zh: 在一次被泄露的四小时投资者谈话中，DeepSeek 的梁文峰表示，中美之间的主要差距是计算访问、Nvidia 的 CUDA 护城河正在瓦解等等（Fred Gau/Inside China）
items.title_bilingual: 在一次被泄露的四小时投资者谈话中，DeepSeek 的梁文峰表示，中美之间的主要差距是计算访问、Nvidia 的 CUDA 护城河正在瓦解等等（Fred Gau/Inside China） / In a leaked four-hour investor talk, DeepSeek's Liang Wenfeng says the main US-China gap is compute access, Nvidia's CUDA moat is disintegrating, and more (Fred Gao/Inside China)

items.title_bilingual: 两党众议院议员提出《人工智能终止开关法案》，该法案将授权美国国土安全部关闭或扼杀其认为危险的人工智能模型（Politico） / Bipartisan House lawmakers introduce the AI Kill Switch Act, which would grant the US DHS authority to shut down or throttle AI models that it deems dangerous (Politico)
